# Resumly

> Resumly is a free AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create ATS-friendly resumes, tailor them to specific job postings, and generate matching cover letters — all in under 90 seconds. Built for 2026 hiring, with 10 professionally designed templates and a built-in ATS checker.

Resumly tailors resumes to any job URL. Paste a LinkedIn, Indeed, or company job link and the platform parses the job, suggests the right keywords, optimizes your resume for ATS, and generates a matching cover letter. The free tier covers the full flow (build, optimize, download PDF) with no credit card required.

## Core product pages
- [Resume Builder](https://resumly.app/resume-builder): Free online resume builder with 10 ATS-friendly templates, live preview, and PDF export.
- [AI Resume Builder](https://resumly.app/ai-resume-builder): Generates a complete resume from a job URL + your background in under 60 seconds.
- [Resume Templates](https://resumly.app/resume-templates): 10 professionally designed, recruiter-approved resume templates (Modern, Classic, Creative, Minimal, Executive, Technical, Academic, Chronological, Functional, Hybrid).
- [ATS Checker](https://resumly.app/ats-checker): Free ATS compatibility scanner — paste a resume, get 20+ quality checks and a match score.
- [Cover Letter Builder](https://resumly.app/cover-letter-builder): AI-generated cover letters personalized to the job and your resume.
- [Pricing](https://resumly.app/pricing): Free plan + Pro plan at $9.99/month (unlimited applications, tracking, interview prep).

## Guides and articles
- [How to Write a Resume](https://resumly.app/blog/how-to-write-a-resume): Step-by-step resume writing guide for 2026.
- [ATS Resume Guide](https://resumly.app/blog/ats-resume-guide): How to beat applicant tracking systems.
- [Resume Summary Examples](https://resumly.app/blog/resume-summary-examples): 30+ professional summary examples by industry.
- [Resume Skills](https://resumly.app/blog/resume-skills): Hard skills vs soft skills and how to list them.
- [How to Write a Cover Letter](https://resumly.app/blog/how-to-write-a-cover-letter): Cover letter structure, tone, and examples.
- [Resume Action Words](https://resumly.app/blog/resume-action-words): 200+ action verbs to make bullets stronger.
- [CV vs Resume](https://resumly.app/blog/cv-vs-resume): Key differences and when to use each.
- [Resume with No Experience](https://resumly.app/blog/resume-with-no-experience): How to write your first resume as a student or career changer.
- [Resume Tips](https://resumly.app/blog/resume-tips): 25 tips recruiters wish you knew.

## About
- Built in 2026, free to use, no credit card required for the full resume + PDF download flow.
- Uses Google Gemini 2.5 for AI-powered tailoring and cover letter generation.
- Stores data in Supabase (encrypted at rest, RLS-secured per user).
- Contact: support@resumly.app

## Policies
- [Privacy Policy](https://resumly.app/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://resumly.app/terms)
